exercises.title: Speedup Comparison
exercises.description: Calculate the speedup of Grover's algorithm for a database of N=1,000,000 items.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

N = 1_000_000

# Classical queries needed
classical = N

# Quantum queries needed (Grover's)
quantum = int(np.sqrt(N) * np.pi / 4)

speedup = classical / quantum

print(f"Classical: {classical:,} queries")
print(f"Quantum: {quantum:,} queries")
print(f"Speedup: {speedup:.0f}x")
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

N = 1_000_000

classical = N
quantum = int(np.sqrt(N) * np.pi / 4)
speedup = classical / quantum

print(f"Classical: {classical:,} queries")
print(f"Quantum: {quantum:,} queries")
print(f"Speedup: {speedup:.0f}x")
# Output: ~1275x speedup

exercises.title: Algorithm Classification
exercises.description: Match each algorithm to its primary application and speedup type.
